- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	- Single Python repository for UI automation, API tests, and load tests.
	- Stack: pytest, Playwright, requests, and Locust.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	- Project structure created in the current workspace root.

- [x] Customize the Project
	- Added UI page objects, API client, Locust scenario, configuration, and test suites.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	- No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project
	- Project files pass editor diagnostics.
	- Dependencies installed into `.venv`.
	- UI tests pass in Chrome and Firefox.
	- API tests pass against Swagger Petstore.
	- Locust load scenario runs successfully against n11.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	- Added VS Code tasks for install, UI, API, full test, and Locust execution.

- [ ] Launch the Project
	- Pending user confirmation.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	- README and workspace instructions reflect the current project state and execution steps.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
